  • Uses of BoardListener in com.example.battleship.controller

    Classes in com.example.battleship.controller that implement BoardListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private class 
    CombatController.HumanBoardListener
    Shots landing on the human's board -- fired by the machine.
    private class 
    CombatController.MachineBoardListener
    Shots landing on the machine's board -- fired by the human player.

  • Uses of BoardListener in com.example.battleship.controller.event

    Classes in com.example.battleship.controller.event that implement BoardListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BoardListenerAdapter
    No-op default implementation of the model's BoardListener, following the same Adapter pattern as ShipPlacementAdapter and CombatAdapter.

  • Uses of BoardListener in com.example.battleship.model.board

    Fields in com.example.battleship.model.board with type parameters of type BoardListener
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<BoardListener>
    Board.listeners
    Listeners are UI/controller wiring, not game state, so they are excluded from serialization and re-created empty on every load (see Board.readObject(java.io.ObjectInputStream)).
    Methods in com.example.battleship.model.board with parameters of type BoardListener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Board.addListener(BoardListener listener)
     
    void
    Board.removeListener(BoardListener listener)
